pages.text: When a $(l:creatures/spirit)Spirit$(/l) is hit enough times, it will became a Subdued Spirit. In this form, they can be carried from the $(l:dimension/spirit_world)Spirit World$(/l) to the overworld.

pages.Title: Spirit Guide
pages.text: A Subdued Spirit can be used in the $(l:circle_magic/other/find_structure)Find Structure Rite$(/l), where it will fly towards the closest $(item)Village$() or $(item)Nether Fortress$().
